meta_desc: Low-cost inflatable cinema screen for small budgets. Professional quality at a low price. Ideal for beginners to outdoor cinema.
hero_h2: Affordable inflatable screens for your indoor and outdoor events.
hero_p: Our low-cost inflatable screens are the ideal solution for events on a budget without compromising on quality. Designed for quick and easy use, these screens are perfect for film screenings, sporting events, outdoor parties and much more.
with_blower_desc: Inflatable screens with blowers feature a permanent inflation system for quick installation and stable screen support throughout the event. These models are suitable for both indoor and outdoor events, thanks to their low power consumption blower (only 250 Watts). So you can enjoy your screen with complete peace of mind.
with_blower_adv_title: The advantages of our inflatable screens
with_blower_adv1: thanks to the blower, the screen is ready in just a few minutes.
with_blower_adv2: even in variable outdoor conditions, our screens remain strong thanks to the permanent blower.
with_blower_adv3: ideal for all types of event, whether outdoor or indoor.
without_blower_desc: Blowerless inflatable screens are perfect for those looking for an economical option while maintaining good projection quality. These screens are easy to transport and can be set up quickly without the need for a permanent blower.
without_blower_adv_title: The advantages of our inflatable screens
without_blower_adv1: ideal for those looking for an affordable option with no extra equipment.
without_blower_adv2: these screens are easy to transport and store, making them ideal for temporary events or rentals.
without_blower_adv3: with screen sizes ranging from 2m to 6m, there's a screen to suit every event, large or small.
icon1_label: One of the cheapest in the world, combining robustness
final_desc: Whether it's for an outdoor event, a film screening or a sporting event, our low-cost inflatable screens are designed to be simple to use, robust and affordable. Make the most of your event with a professional-quality screen.
cta_desc: Get made-to-measure inflatable solutions for your outdoor event. Contact us, request a quick quote or discover our competitive rates.
